PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg, via Zoom, for Debra Dolch, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that this probate had been initiated to file an ancillary probate in Canada to marshal assets there and is waiting for that matter to be resolved before filing a petition to terminate this matter for lack of assets.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that there is an issue of how many times the word "lost" was used in the notice, that it is satisfied that it can waive defect in notice as the word "lost" is in the caption of the petition and in the body, and that a copy of the petition referring to the lost will was served. Ms. Eisenberg stated that she is not aware of any objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 21, 2012 is admitted to probate. Debra Dolch is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 6, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
